tool.name: EnzyWizard Conservation
tool.description: Calculate residue sequence conservation from a cleaned protein sequence and MSA
tool.command:
exec 3>&1 4>&2 exec > enzywizard.log 2>&1;
#set $fasta_name = $input_fasta.element_identifier #set $msa_name = $input_msa.element_identifier ln -s '$input_fasta' '$fasta_name' && ln -s '$input_msa' '$msa_name' && enzywizard-conservation -i '$fasta_name' -m '$msa_name' -o ./
tool.help: Calculate residue sequence conservation from a cleaned protein sequence and MSA. The wrapper symlinks Galaxy file inputs into the job working directory and captures the tool-created output directory/files as a Galaxy discovered collection.
